_note: Cursor must update this file when a module advances a tier. Matrix Agent verifies tier claims at each 3-day review.
_dual_path: Each module has two names: gmp_name (Path A — regulatory product) and ai_analogue (Path B — AI governance framework). Same code. Different lens.

_tier_definitions.SKELETON: Models + router exists. No real business logic. Not usable.
_tier_definitions.FUNCTIONAL: All 5 module files complete. Core workflows work end-to-end. Tests pass. Overdue hook wired and notifying.
_tier_definitions.HARDENED: Edge cases handled. Performance queries (SQL COUNT, no full-table loads). Status flags maintained. CORS/auth reviewed.
_tier_definitions.VALIDATED: URS written. IQ/OQ protocols executed. Alembic migrations tested on copy of prod DB. Part 11 audit trail verified.

SKELETON_to_FUNCTIONAL: models.py, router.py, services.py, tasks.py, schemas.py all present
At least 3 API endpoints working end-to-end
Overdue hook wired and calling NotificationService
Module added to MODULE_NAMES in test_architecture_boundaries.py
FUNCTIONAL_to_HARDENED: No full-table loads in tasks.py (SQL COUNT only)
Status flags maintained by scheduler (is_overdue, status='overdue' etc.)
Site isolation enforced on every query
Back-fill prevention on all execution fields
All write endpoints create AuditEvent records
chaos.py still passing after module is added to real test scope
HARDENED_to_VALIDATED: IQ protocol executed and signed off
OQ protocol executed and signed off
Alembic migrations tested on a copy of production database
21 CFR Part 11 audit trail spot-checked by QA manager
E-signature flows tested with real credentials

foundation.ai_analogue_function: Immutable audit trail (provenance graph), e-signature = non-repudiation, workflow engine = state machine orchestration, boundary enforcement = containment of module failures

auth.notes: JWT, RBAC, sessions, password history, site model

audit.notes: Append-only AuditEvent. Server timestamps. Every action traceable.

documents.notes: Version-controlled. Approval-gated. Periodic review hook wired.

notify.notes: send_rule_based; scheduler rules; overdue hooks notify.

integration.notes: SAP/DeltaV connector stubs. Hardware-bound systems never write-accessed.

blocking: Table partitioning (TASK-010) before extreme volume in audit_events

qms.ai_analogue_function: Checks outputs against intent. Flags deviation from expected behaviour. Enforces standards. Manages corrective actions. The module that asks: 'did this output actually match what was requested?'
qms.path_b_capability: Deviation = detected misalignment. CAPA = corrective action loop. Change Control = proposed modification requiring human approval before implementation.
qms.notes: CAPA overdue hook notifies. Remaining business depth TBD.

mes.ai_analogue_function: Manages task sequencing, resource allocation, step-by-step execution with verification, completion confirmation. No step is marked done without evidence. Back-fill prevention = no retroactive falsification of execution records.
mes.path_b_capability: MBR = task template. Batch Record = execution instance. BatchRecordStep = individual verified action. Release = human-approved output gate.
mes.notes: MBR, EBR, BatchRecordStep. Cross-module FK removed. Back-fill prevention in place. Needs e-sig on release.
blocking: E-signature on batch release not yet verified

equipment.ai_analogue_function: Tracks whether each tool/agent/resource is within its verified operating envelope. Flags drift. Enforces re-qualification before a degraded tool is trusted again. Answers: 'is this component still fit for purpose?'
equipment.path_b_capability: Calibration = periodic verification of agent capability. Qualification = formal proof of fitness. Maintenance = corrective action on degraded capability.
equipment.notes: Calibration SQL counts; is_overdue maintained by hook; batch notification.

training.ai_analogue_function: Ensures sub-components have demonstrated competency before being trusted with tasks. Read-and-understood e-signature = agent has acknowledged constraints. Tracks skill currency — an agent that hasn't been re-calibrated recently loses trusted status.
training.path_b_capability: Curriculum = capability specification. Assignment = required learning task. Completion with e-sig = verified acknowledgement. Overdue = capability expired.
training.notes: Assignment status=overdue from hook; SQL counts; notifications.

lims.ai_analogue_function: Samples data streams. Verifies provenance of information. Detects distortion, manipulation, or contamination. Quarantines outputs that fail verification. Every data point has a chain of custody. OOS = out-of-specification = detected anomaly requiring investigation.
lims.path_b_capability: Sample = data input under examination. TestResult = verification outcome (append-only, corrections reference originals). OOSInvestigation = anomaly investigation triggered automatically on failure. Specification = what 'pure' looks like for this data type.
lims.path_b_priority: HIGHEST — this is the module that makes the entire system trustworthy. Without verified information provenance, all other modules operate on potentially corrupted inputs.
lims.notes: TestMethod, Spec, Sample, TestResult, OOSInvestigation. Append-only TestResult in place. OOS auto-trigger not wired.
blocking: OOS auto-trigger on fail result not implemented

env_monitoring.ai_analogue_function: Monitors the conditions in which other modules operate. Detects environmental drift that could degrade output quality even when modules appear to be functioning correctly. Answers: 'is the operating context still within safe parameters?'
env_monitoring.path_b_capability: MonitoringLocation = context dimension being tracked. AlertLimit = constitutional boundary for that dimension. Trend = pattern detection over time. Sensor integration = real-world signal ingestion.
env_monitoring.notes: Trend review overdue hook + notification template. No hardware sensor integration.

deltav.notes: DeltaVHistorianConnector class. In AI governance: the hardcode interface — human-defined immutable constraints, emergency stops, ethical boundaries.

_path_b_module_priority_order: lims (Information Purity Engine) — build first: without this, nothing is trustworthy
qms (Alignment Guard) — build second: detects when outputs deviate from intent
mes (Execution Orchestrator) — build third: structured task execution with verification
foundation/audit (Provenance Graph) — already HARDENED: the backbone of trust
equipment (Capability Verification) — build fourth: ensures tools remain fit for purpose
training (Capability Certification) — build fifth: ensures agents are current
env_monitoring (Environment Sentinel) — build sixth: context integrity
